description.value:
Archetype Dedication

You have consumed the Gomu Gomu no Mi, permanently transforming your body into living rubber. You gain the following benefits while your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • You are immune to electricity damage.
  • You gain resistance to bludgeoning damage equal to your level (minimum 5).
  • Your unarmed Strikes deal bludgeoning damage and gain the nonlethal and reach (10 feet) traits.

You gain the Sea-Bound trait. All archetype benefits are suppressed while you are Sea-Bound (in seawater or contact with Seastone).
